title: carduus stenolepis
intro: Carduus stenolepis, also known as the Spiny Thistle or Greek Thistle, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Carduus stenolepis include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
